comment: Drives the GitHub Pages deploy (.github/workflows/pages.yml assembles the artifact from this file via .github/scripts/assemble-pages.ts; nothing else decides what gets published). Each {from, to} entry copies a repo file or directory (recursive) to a site output path rooted at https://wow-look-at-my.github.io/scratch_ui/. Components + tokens are published at the site ROOT — the pre-restructure layout external consumers embed, mirroring the js-snippets root-relative URL convention — and also under /components so the demo's relative ../components/ references resolve; src/index.html forwards the site root to the spec site under /demo/.
